briefs.title: Burnaby Council considers new zoning districts, supportive housing engagement, and hotel conversion
briefs.summary: At its January 13, 2026 meeting, Burnaby Council voted on several key items including new non-residential zoning districts (sent back to staff for more work), a requirement for BC Housing to expand public engagement on a proposed supportive housing site at 5389 Imperial Street, and approval to convert Christine Sinclair Community Centre into a 56-room hotel.
briefs.action_required: Watch for the revised non-residential zoning bylaw — it could affect where and how your business operates in Burnaby.
briefs.industries: Construction & Development, Hotel & Accommodation, Landlord & Property Mgmt
